NetSparkleUpdater.​SignatureVerifiers.​Ed25519Checker
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​ISignatureVerifier
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​SignatureVerifiers.​Ed25519Checker

Class to verify a Ed25519 signature

Variables
_signer
private Ed25519Signer? _signer
Functions
Ed25519Checker
public Ed25519Checker(
SecurityMode 
mode,
string? 
publicKey
 = 
null,
string? 
publicKeyFile
 = 
"NetSparkle_Ed25519.pub",
bool 
readFileBeingVerifiedInChunks
 = 
false,
int 
chunkSize
 = 
1024*1024*25
)

Create a Ed25519Checker object from the given parameters

Parameters
mode
SecurityMode

The security mode of the validator. Controls what needs to be set in order to validate an app cast and its items.

publicKey
string?

the base 64 public key as a string

publicKeyFile
string?

the public key file

readFileBeingVerifiedInChunks
bool

if true, reads the file this checker is verifying in chunks rather than all at once

chunkSize
int

if reading the file in chunks, size of chunks to read with. Defaults to 25 MB.

HasValidKeyInformation
public bool HasValidKeyInformation()

Determines if a public key exists

Returns

bool

Properties
SecurityMode
public SecurityMode SecurityMode {
get;
set
}
ReadFileBeingVerifiedInChunks
public bool ReadFileBeingVerifiedInChunks {
get;
set
}

When verifying files, whether to read the file in by chunks.  This will save RAM when verifying files because it saves the file from being in both a byte[] and in the signature verifier internal byte storage.

ChunkSize
public int ChunkSize {
get;
set
}

If reading file being verified in chunks, the size of the chunk.  Defaults to 25 MB.

string 
signature,
ref

result
)

string 
signature,
byte[] 
dataToVerify

signature,

binaryPath

string 
signature,
string 
data
)
TryGetFileResource
private static Stream? TryGetFileResource(
string 
publicKey
)

Gets a file resource based on a public key at a given path

Parameter
publicKey
string

the file name of the public key

Returns

the data stream of the file resource if the file exists; null otherwise

TryGetResourceStream
private static Stream? TryGetResourceStream(
string 
publicKeyResourceName
)

Get a resource stream based on the public key

Parameter
publicKeyResourceName
string

the public key resource name

Returns

a stream that contains the public key if found; null otherwise
